questions.question: What is the difference between a process and a thread in operating systems?
questions.hint: Explain the key differences between processes and threads

questions.question: Write a C program to create a new process using the fork() system call. Explain the output of this program.
questions.hint: Use the fork() system call to create a new process, and explain the output in terms of process ID and parent-child relationships

questions.question: What is the purpose of the wait() system call in operating systems? Provide an example of its usage.
questions.hint: Explain the purpose and usage of the wait() system call
